name: rpgiv2free
displayName: Bob Cozzi's RPGLE / RPG IV to RPG Free Conversion
description: Bob Cozzi's Convert RPG IV fixed-format code to free-format code.

commands.title: Convert RPG IV to Free Format

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == 'rpgle' || editorLangId == 'sqlrpgle' || editorLangId == 'rpgleinc') && !suggestWidgetVisible && !inSnippetMode && (rpgiv2free.isFixedFormat || config.rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnter == 'fixedAndFree' || config.rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnter == '*ALL') && config.rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnter != 'disable'

rpgiv2free.convertBINTOINT.title: Smart Convert BIN to INT
rpgiv2free.convertBINTOINT.description: When enabled, converts RPG IV B ('binary') fields with no decimal positions to the equivalent Integer (INT) data type. Fields with decimal positions are always converted to BINDEC.

rpgiv2free.VerifyCode4IBMi.title: Verify CODE for IBM i Extension API
rpgiv2free.VerifyCode4IBMi.description: Verify and log Code4IBMi Extension is running (Debug mode only).

rpgiv2free.altMOVEL.title: Include alternative MOVEL conversion as comment
rpgiv2free.altMOVEL.description: Insert comment with an alternative MOVEL conversion

rpgiv2free.indyMOVEAStyle.title: MOVEA Conversion Style
enumDescriptions: For Loop - Convert MOVEA to a FOR loop
List Assignment - Convert MOVEA to %SUBARR(*IN:n) = %LIST('1':'0') style.
rpgiv2free.indyMOVEAStyle.description: Choose how to convert MOVEA operations when setting indicators.

rpgiv2free.addINZ.title: Include INZ when converting data structures
rpgiv2free.addINZ.description: Add INZ keyword to data structures that do not have one.

rpgiv2free.enableOvertypeInFixedFormat.title: Overtype Mode in Fixed-Format Columns
rpgiv2free.enableOvertypeInFixedFormat.description: When enabled (and RPG Smart Tab is on), typing a character in a fixed-format RPG spec column (cols 1–80) replaces the character under the cursor instead of inserting it. This preserves column alignment without displacing surrounding field values. Disable if you prefer standard insert behaviour or if a conflict with another extension is reported.

rpgiv2free.overtypeOnStart.title: Start in Overtype Mode
rpgiv2free.overtypeOnStart.description: Controls the initial state of the OVR (overtype) mode when the extension first activates. When true, overtype mode is on at startup. The OVR status bar button shows the current state and can toggle it at any time; that last-used state is remembered across sessions.

rpgiv2free.nationalVariantChars.title: RPG IV National Variant Identifier Characters
rpgiv2free.nationalVariantChars.markdownDescription: Additional characters that are valid in RPG IV identifier names when source was written on an IBM i system using a non-CCSID-37 locale. Each character listed here corresponds to one of the three EBCDIC byte positions (`X'5B'`, `X'7B'`, `X'7C'`) that differ between CCSIDs, and which IBM i compilers accept as valid name characters (equivalent to `$`, `#`, and `@` in CCSID 37). The default covers all known IBM i single-byte CCSIDs: `§` (CCSID 273/280/423), `Æ`/`Ø` (277), `Å` (277/278/1122), `Ä` (278/1122), `Ö` (278/905/1026/1122), `Ñ` (284), `£` (280/285/297/423), `Ð` (871), `Ş` (905/1026), `İ` (905/1026), `¥` (290/836), `à` (297). Lowercase equivalents are recognised automatically. Note: `_` (underscore) is valid only after the first character and is always included regardless of this setting.

rpgiv2free.parenthesizeANDOR.title: Parenthesize Mixed AND/OR Conditions
rpgiv2free.parenthesizeANDOR.description: When enabled, wraps each AND-group in parentheses when a condition mixes ANDxx and ORxx opcodes. For example: (A and B) or (C and D). Pure-AND or pure-OR chains are not affected.

rpgiv2free.rightMargin.title: Right margin for converted free format code
rpgiv2free.rightMargin.description: Right Margin for converted free format code.

rpgiv2free.leftMargin.title: Left Margin for first line of converted code (indent)
rpgiv2free.leftMargin.description: Left Margin for first line of converted free format code.

rpgiv2free.leftMarginContinued.title: Left Margin for continued converted code
rpgiv2free.leftMarginContinued.description: Left Margin for Secondary lines of converted free format code.

rpgiv2free.indentDirectives.title: Indent Compiler Directives
rpgiv2free.indentDirectives.description: Number of columns to indent /include, /copy etc.

rpgiv2free.AddEXTDeviceFlag.title: Add *EXT to device ID on File specs
rpgiv2free.AddEXTDeviceFlag.description: Add *EXT to DISK, WORKSTN, etc. when converting externally described files.

rpgiv2free.ReplaceCOPYwithINCLUDE_RPG.title: Replace /COPY with /INCLUDE [RPGLE]
rpgiv2free.ReplaceCOPYwithINCLUDE_RPG.description: Replaces /copy statements in RPGLE source members with a /include directive.

rpgiv2free.ReplaceCOPYwithINCLUDE_SQLRPG.title: Replace /COPY with /INCLUDE [SQLRPG]
rpgiv2free.ReplaceCOPYwithINCLUDE_SQLRPG.description: Replaces /copy statements in SQLRPG* source members with a /include directive.

rpgiv2free.RemoveOLDDirectives.title: Remove old, deprecated, legacy compiler directives

rpgiv2free.tempVarName1.title: Work variable name for String Opcodes
rpgiv2free.tempVarName1.description: Generated variable name used for fixed to free format CAT, SUBST etc, opcode conversions.

rpgiv2free.tempVarName2.title: Work variable name for DO/FOR Loop counter variable
rpgiv2free.tempVarName2.description: Generated variable name used for fixed to free format DO/FOR operations.

rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnter.title: Enable RPG Smart Enter key (non-destructive)
enumDescriptions: Enable Smart Enter only for fixed-format RPG
Enable Smart Enter for both fixed-format and free-format RPG
Enable Smart Enter for all source file types (RPG and non-RPG)
rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnter.description: Controls the RPG Smart Enter key behavior.

rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnterDupSpec.title: Duplicate Fixed Format Spec on Smart Enter
rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartEnterDupSpec.description: When RPG Smart Enter is enabled, then on Enter, Duplicate the RPG spec and align cursor to prior entry.

rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartTab.title: Enable Smart Columnar Tab in fixed format
rpgiv2free.enableRPGSmartTab.description: Enable RPG Smart Tab/Shift+Tab navigation in RPG IV fixed-format source lines.

rpgiv2free.enableRPGColumnGuides.title: Enable RPG Fixed-Format Columnar Guides
rpgiv2free.enableRPGColumnGuides.description: Show vertical columnar guidelines for fixed-format RPG (independent of Smart Tab/Enter features).

rpgiv2free.verticalTabColor_DarkMode.description: Fixed format RPG IV vertical columnar boundary ruler color for dark mode editing.

rpgiv2free.verticalTabColor_LightMode.description: Fixed format RPG IV vertical columnar boundary ruler color for light mode editing.

rpgiv2free.verticalTabWidth_LightMode.description: Line width (in pixels) for vertical tab stops in light mode.

rpgiv2free.verticalTabWidth_DarkMode.description: Line width (in pixels) for vertical tab stops in dark mode.

rpgiv2free.enableFixedFormatHighlighting.title: Enable Fixed-Format RPG IV Syntax Highlighting
rpgiv2free.enableFixedFormatHighlighting.description: Adds column-aware semantic syntax highlighting for fixed-format RPG IV and RPG III source lines. OFF by default.

scripts.publish:all: npm run fix && npm run compile && npm run publish:ms && npm run publish:vsx
